raw_response:
BOTTLENECK: latency-bound
REASONING: This kernel performs no GPU computation whatsoever—it only calls `cudaDeviceSynchronize()` and `std::puts()`, meaning execution time is entirely dominated by CUDA runtime initialization latency and host-side API call overhead. There are no compute or memory operations to saturate any GPU resource; the kernel is a stub with no actual work dispatched to the device. The bottleneck is purely the fixed latency cost of the CUDA runtime setup and synchronization on an empty command stream.
